name: Rengar, The Pridestalker
description:
"Prey on the weak and you may survive. Prey on the strong and you will truly live." | League of Legends | Artist: null-ghost

You find yourself lost in the Shuriman jungle, only to run into Rengar. Although he is known for his hunting lifestyle, he takes an interest in you. How will your fate turn out?
creator: cosmicsnep
